name: handigraphs-stats-api
description: Discover and query live Handigraphs MLB and NHL statistics through a read-only local MCP server.
long_description: Connect Claude Desktop to the Handigraphs Stats API. Discover live resources, metrics, splits, units, and filters before querying read-only MLB and NHL statistics.

tools.name: list_resources
tools.description: List live Handigraphs sports and Stats API resources.

tools.name: describe_resource
tools.description: Describe a live resource's metrics, units, splits, and filters.

tools.name: query_stats
tools.description: Query one read-only Handigraphs Stats API resource.
